properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This Message bought us back to oneness with our God, With Seven Seals opening up His Holy Word. Seven Mysteries thundering out and unfolding; Rapturing Faith for Rapturing Grace now revealing.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The Adoption, full Redemption, All authority and power Is restored unto the Bride in this great hour.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I was troubled and confused in Laodicea, No satisfaction for this deep and inward hunger, Clouds of darkness hovered o’er me trying to blind me, The Light broke through, the shadows flew, and now I can see.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I have heard about the inspired declaration, Made by ambassadors for Christ from South in Trinidad, The move is on for the chosen ones by election; The local Bride is gathering in for the adoption.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Seven Voices thundered out in this hour, Revealing Faith to Brotherly Kindness for the Rapture, Anointing hearts and lives with overcoming power; Fear and bondage, skepticism could not linger.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We are quickened by this blessed revelation, Changing from glory unto glory for Redemption, Perfect Love uniting hearts for translation, Perfect Faith conquering death for resurrection.
